# genesyscloud_case_management_stageplan (Data Source)

Looks up the composite Terraform id for a stageplan by caseplan_id and stage_number (same ordering as the resource).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "genesyscloud_case_management_stageplan" "example_stageplan" {
  name = "Example Stageplan Name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `caseplan_id` (String)
- `stage_number` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
